text: I am surrounded by geometric forms and bright, artificial light. The room feels both open and contained, glass walls inviting vision while simultaneously dividing. Entering the R+D space, I sense a quiet hum of possibility—a place for thought and innovation. The abstract patterns and texts on the wall heighten my awareness of observation itself, making me hyper-conscious of my own presence here. I feel a delicate tension between curiosity and self-consciousness, inspired yet slightly uneasy, as if under the gentle scrutiny of ideas themselves.
